document:
Northwind Systems Support Handbook

Support hours: Monday-Friday, 09:00-17:00 UTC.
Refund policy: Customers may request a refund within 21 days of purchase.
Invoice questions should go to billing@northwind.example.
Security incidents must be acknowledged within 2 hours.
Escalation changes must be documented in the operations runbook.
question: What is the refund window in days?
